channel.title: Journal of South Asian Languages and Linguistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of South Asian Languages and Linguistics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-frontmatter1-2

item.title: Complex verb constructions in Indo-Aryan in synchrony and diachrony: an introduction
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2012

item.title: Remarks on the diachrony of verbal periphrasis in Vedic Sanskrit
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2004

item.title: Secondary predicates and motion events: the rise of complex predicates in Vedic Sanskrit
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2006

item.title: Early Vedic denominatives and their analytic counterparts with √ kr̥ ‘do, make’
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2009

item.title: Action nouns in Vedic support-verb constructions with kṛ
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2008

item.title: The use of ās- ‘sit’ and vas- ‘dwell’ plus participle and gerund from Early Vedic to Epic Sanskrit
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2007

item.title: Double-finite Serial Verbs in Sanskrit and later Indo-Aryan
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2005

item.title: Nell Shapiro Hawley & Sohini Sarah Pillai: Many Mahābhāratas (SUNY series in Hindu studies)
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2016

item.title: In memoriam Dipak Bhattacharya (1940–2023)
item.description: Article by Mau Das Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2024-2015
